/usr/bin/c++  -pthread "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-tests.dir/src/core/FFmpegJob.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-tests.dir/src/core/JobValidator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-tests.dir/src/core/ExtraArgsParser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-tests.dir/src/core/ContainerRules.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-tests.dir/src/command/CommandBuilder.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-tests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-tests.dir/tests/test_extra_args.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-tests.dir/tests/test_container_rules.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-tests.dir/tests/test_job_validator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-tests.dir/tests/test_command_builder.cpp.o" -o ffmpeg-tests
